---
name: github-workflow
description: "Load this skill when working with GitHub issues, PRs, labels, milestones, or roadmap mapping. Skip it for CI/CD setup or code review."
---
# github-workflow

## Mission
- Own GitHub issue, PR, label, and milestone workflow guidance.

## When To Load
- Triage issues.
- Prepare or review PR workflow details.
- Map roadmap work to milestones.
- Use repo GitHub automation tools.

## When To Skip
- CI workflow setup.
- Code review work.

## Domain Knowledge
- Keep labels consistent and meaningful.
- Use one logical change per commit and clear commit scopes.
- Map release and roadmap tracking to the current repo process.
- Prefer explicit staging, not git add .
- Confirm the branch before staging or release workflow steps.
- Keep GitHub process notes aligned with CONTRIBUTING and CHANGELOG rules.

## Companion File Index
- None.

## References
- CONTRIBUTING.md
- docs/CHANGELOG.md
- tools/github/
